title: GitHub CI: ci.yml (rust fmt+clippy+test, web typecheck+test+bundle) + release.yml (multi-target), format code
action: Imitate ~/projects/mdview CI, adapted for Rust+web. ci.yml: rust job (checkout, dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable rustfmt+clippy, Swatinem/rust-cache, cargo fmt --all --check, cargo clippy --all-targets -D warnings, cargo test) + web job (actions/setup-node, npm ci in web/, npm run typecheck, npm test --run, npm run bundle). release.yml: on tag v*, multi-target musl+mac+windows build of herdctl, bundle web, package tarball with binary+static+config.example+packaging+install.sh+README. Run cargo fmt to make the tree fmt-clean so ci fmt check passes.

prohibitions: Do not change app behavior when formatting

verify: cargo fmt --all --check && cargo test --quiet && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings

trace.outcome: Added .github/workflows/ci.yml (rust: fmt+clippy+test; web: npm ci+typecheck+test+bundle) and release.yml (tag v* → musl x86_64/aarch64 + macos aarch64 + windows, bundles web + packages tarball/zip with binary+static+config+installer+docs), imitating mdview's structure adapted for Rust+web. Ran cargo fmt across the tree so ci fmt check is green. All CI commands verified passing locally. Committed 416366f.
trace.verification_evidence:
Every command CI runs verified locally:
- cargo fmt --all --check: clean (tree formatted)
- cargo test: 74 pass; cargo clippy --all-targets -D warnings: clean
- web: npm ci (lock in sync), npm run typecheck clean, npm test 15 pass, npm run bundle built in 587ms
- both workflow files parse as valid YAML
Release packaging references only existing files (static/, config.example.json, install.sh, README.md, packaging/, docs/).
trace.verify_output: fmt --check clean; 74 rust tests; clippy clean; web: npm ci ok, typecheck clean, 15 tests, bundle built 587ms; both workflows valid YAML
trace.verify_command: cargo fmt --all --check && cargo test && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings && cd web && npm ci && npm run typecheck && npm test -- --run && npm run bundle
